student_input: My FSc marks are 550/1100 and NET is 101/200. I want to apply to NUST.

state.student_input: My FSc marks are 550/1100 and NET is 101/200. I want to apply to NUST.
state.advice: Congratulations on having an eligibility status of true. With an FSC score of 550 out of 1100 and a NET score of 101 out of 200, your calculated merit score is 50.38%. Given the merit formula used by NUST, where FSC contributes 25% and NET contributes 75%, it's clear that your NET score has a significant impact on your overall merit score. To improve your chances, consider focusing on improving your NET score, as even a small increase can significantly boost your merit score. For example, increasing your NET score to 120 out of 200 could potentially increase your merit score by several percentage points. Keep working hard and stay positive, and you'll increase your chances of getting admitted to NUST.
